zh.lifeSummary: Agatha Schwartz是Johann Schwartz的女兒，於1523年出生在法國德 艾斯特莫瑟勒薩雷明斯。她和Hans Landorf至少有3個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1622年在德國薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯曼德爾巴塔爾艾維利-林根享年99歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Agatha Schwartz是Johann Schwartz的女儿，于1523年出生在法国德 艾斯特莫瑟勒薩雷明斯。她和Hans Landorf至少有3个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1622年在德国薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯曼德爾巴塔爾艾維利-林根享年99岁。

nameMeanings.name: Schwartz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Emanuel, Meyer, Chaim, Isadore, Moshe, Aron, Ari, Mayer, Hershel.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): nickname for someone with black hair or a dark complexion, from Middle High German swarz, German schwarz, Yiddish shvarts ‘dark, black’. In some cases this may be a habitational name from any of the places called Schwarz, named with the same word. This form of the surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Denmark, Sweden, Hungary, etc. Compare Schwarcz , Schwarz , Shwartz , Swarts , and Swartz .

variants.name: Schwartze
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Schwartz  .

variants.name: Schwarze
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Fritz, Kurt, Erhard, Helmut, Hermann, Joerg, Jurgen, Reiner, Wilfried.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Schwartz  .

variants.name: Schwarting
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Fritz.
Dutch and North German: patronymic from a nickname from Middle Low German schwart ‘black’. Compare German Schwartz .

variants.name: Swartz
meanings: Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) Schwartz or Schwarz ‘dark, black’, and of their Slavicized forms Švarc (Czech, Slovak, Slovenian, and Croatian) and Szwarc (Polish).
Dutch: variant of   Swarts  .

variants.name: Shvarts
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Russian Boris, Vladimir, Yury, Anatoly, Betya, Grigoriy, Igor, Iosif, Leonid, Lev, Mikhail, Yefim.  Jewish Yakov, Alter, Ber, Golda, Itsik, Mikhael, Moisey, Sarra.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): variant, transliterated from Russian, of   Schwartz  .

variants.name: Schwarcz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Zalmon, Dov, Moises, Moishe, Zev.  Hungarian Jeno, Laszlo, Sandor, Zoltan.
Hungarian and Jewish (from Hungary): variant of   Schwartz  .

variants.name: Schwarte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Heribert, Horst.
North German and Dutch: nickname for someone with black hair or a dark complexion. Compare German   Schwartz  .

variants.name: Schwarz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Otto, Erwin, Gunter, Heinz, Wolfgang, Gerhard, Manfred, Klaus, Bernhard, Ernst.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of Schwartz . This surname is also found in Slovakia, Czechia, Poland, Croatia, and Slovenia, where it is more common in Slavicized forms (see 2 below) and where it was often applied as a translation into German of Slavic cognates like Czech and Slovak Černý (see Cerny 1), Slovenian Černe (see Cerne 1). It is also found in some western European countries, notably in France (Alsace and Lorraine) and the Netherlands.
Germanized form of Czech, Slovak, Slovenian, and Croatian Švarc (see Swartz 2) and Polish Szwarc , surnames of German origin (see above).

variants.name: Shwartz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Eliyahu, Meyer, Tali.
Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Schwartz   or   Schwarz   ‘dark, black’.

nameMeanings.name: Agatha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Agnes   and   Agatha .

variants.name: Agnes
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Edict of Nantes
historicEvents.description: Under the rule of Henry IV of France the Edict of Nantes was issued giving the people some religious liberty. The edict brought an end to the religious wars that were going on at the time.
Reigns of Louis XIII and Louis XIV. Royal power at its peak. France dominates Europe, French culture spreads. Start of large-scale sea trade.

historicEvents.title: 30 Years War
historicEvents.description: Ferdinand II was trying to force the people to follow Catholicism. The 30 years war was a battle of religion with the Protestants and Catholics, in the Holy Roman Empire.

en.lifeSummary: Agatha Schwartz was born in 1523, in Sarreguemines, Moselle, Grand Est, France as the daughter of Johann Schwartz. She had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with Hans Landorf. She died in 1622, in Erfweiler-Ehlingen, Mandelbachtal, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Germany, at the age of 99.

de.lifeSummary: Agatha Schwartz wurde 1523 in Sarreguemines, Moselle, Großer Osten, Frankreich, als Tochter von Johann Schwartz geboren. Sie hatte mit Hans Landorf mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1622 im Alter von 99 Jahren in Erfweiler-Ehlingen, Mandelbachtal, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Agatha Schwartz è nata il nel 1523 nel Sarreguemines, Moselle, Grand Est, Francia come figlia di Johann Schwartz. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie con Hans Landorf. Morì nel 1622, nel Erfweiler-Ehlingen, Mandelbachtal, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Germania, all'età di 99 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agatha Schwartzは1523年にフランスグランド エストモセルサレグエミンスでJohann Schwartzの娘として生まれた。彼女はHans Landorfとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1622年にドイツサアルランドサアルプファルズ-クレイスマンデルバチタルエルフウエイラー-エhリンジェンで99歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agatha Schwartz(은)는 1523년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 모셀 사르구민스에서 Johann Schwartz의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Hans Landorf(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1622년 독일 사알랜드 사아르p팔즈-크레이스 먼델바ch탤 르프위레-h링에서 99세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Agatha Schwartz nasceu em 1523, em Sarreguemines, Moselle, Grand Est, França filha de Johann Schwartz. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas com Hans Landorf. Ela faleceu em 1622, em Erfweiler-Ehlingen, Mandelbachtal, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Alemanha, com 99 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Agatha Schwartz родилась в 1523 г. в местности саррегуемаинесь, моселл, гранд эст, Франция. Её отца звали Johann Schwartz. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери от Hans Landorf. Она умерла в 1622 г. в местности эрфвилир-элинген, манделбачталь, саарпфалз-крис, саарланд, Германия в возрасте 99 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Agatha Schwartz nació en 1523, en Sarreguemines, Moselle, Grand Est, Francia como hija de Johann Schwartz. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas con Hans Landorf. Murió en 1622, en Erfweiler-Ehlingen, Mandelbachtal, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Alemania, a la edad de 99 años.
